ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the table */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the table was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the table */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the table was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the table is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_configurations" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent configuration */,
  "parentKey" TEXT /* Key that identifies the parent configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parent configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the parent configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parent configuration was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the parent configuration */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the parent configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the theme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the theme */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was last modified */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the theme is the default theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_types" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart type */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the chart type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart type was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the chart type */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_specifications" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout specification */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout specification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout specification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the layout specification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the layout specification was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the layout specification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the layout specification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_specifications" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter specification */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter specification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter specification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the filter specification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter specification was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the filter specification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter specification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sort_column_references" (
  "sort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sort column reference */,
  "tableRef" INTEGER /* Reference to the table that contains the column */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column used for sorting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sort column reference */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sort column reference was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the sort column reference */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the sort column reference was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sort_column_references_tableRef FOREIGN KEY ("tableRef") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link source */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section used for linking */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the link source */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the link source was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the link source */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the link source was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_target_columns" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link target column */,
  "tableRef" INTEGER /* Reference to the table that contains the column */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column used as a target for linking */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link target column */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the link target column */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the link target column was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the link target column */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the link target column was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_target_columns_tableRef FOREIGN KEY ("tableRef") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit that the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dashboard */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
